headline: Board member Eddy W. Hartenstein will retire from Broadcom's Board of Directors at the 2026 annual meeting of stockholders upon reaching the mandatory retirement age of 75.
investor_impact: This is a routine corporate governance event triggered by the company's mandatory retirement age policy and does not signal any internal disagreements or strategic shifts. The reduction of the board size to eight members should have no material impact on Broadcom's operations or investment thesis.
